query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_002', 'Sixth Sense Awakening', 'action', 'rare', 'order', 'air', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 3, 0, 0, 'Reveal all hidden enemy units and traps. Your units gain +1 power for each revealed enemy this turn.', 'A perception beyond the five senses.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_002_sixth_sense-2qxeACWH5U39Kq4cZ5Kgp7.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["perception","reveal"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_003', 'Elegy of the Changed World', 'action', 'uncommon', 'order', 'water', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 2, 0, 0, 'All units on the field lose 1 power. Draw 2 cards. If you control a Demagi unit, draw 3 instead.', 'Even hedonism cannot silence the approaching reckoning.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_003_elegy_changed-VA8ZqAM7dsfhxpxDBJ2Vpm.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["elegy","draw"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_004', 'New Babylons Reckoning', 'event', 'epic', 'chaos', 'fire', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 5, 0, 0, 'Destroy all locations on the field. Deal 3 damage to all units. Locations cannot be played for 2 turns.', 'New Babylon goddamn — every brick laid on the backs of the silenced.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_004_new_babylon-7iX55GYnBU9AFn2SfkFhQm.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["destruction","judgment"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_005', 'The Degens Escape', 'character', 'common', 'chaos', 'earth', 'reality', 'spy', 'human', NULL, 2, 3, 3, 'When this unit takes damage, it may move to an adjacent zone. Cannot be targeted by spells while in a location you control.', 'Even in the end times, some just want to party.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_005_degens_escape-fKFwboJQfBNUaiMXNGduAb.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["evasion","stealth"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_006', 'The Ninth Summoning', 'character', 'legendary', 'chaos', 'fire', 'reality', 'assassin', 'demagi', NULL, 7, 9, 6, 'When summoned, destroy the weakest enemy unit. At the start of each turn, deal 2 damage to all enemy units. Cannot be healed.', 'The ninth entity from the Hierarchy of the Damned.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_006_ninth_summoning-eptZAQJBj7Xa5bZ5Ms2eRr.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["summoning","destruction"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_007', 'The Final Verdict', 'event', 'legendary', 'order', 'earth', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 6, 0, 0, 'Choose one: Destroy all Chaos-aligned units OR return all Order-aligned units from the discard pile to the field with 1 health.', 'Every entity must face judgment.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_007_final_verdict-HE4r8zVHA5P4GCjeE3kEJy.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["judgment","destruction"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl)
